name: BROWN & BROWN, INC.
business: Brown & Brown, Inc. is a diversified insurance agency, wholesale brokerage, insurance programs and service organization that markets and sells insurance products and services, primarily in the property, casualty and employee benefits areas. The Company primarily operates as an agent or broker but also assumes underwriting risk through captive insurance companies and a flood insurance carrier. It serves commercial, public, quasi-public, professional, and individual customers through two segments: Retail and Specialty Distribution.
sellsTo: specific industries, trade groups, governmental entities and market niches

exposures.sentence: A cybersecurity attack or any other interruption in information technology and/or data security that may impact our operations or the operations of third parties that support us, could adversely affect our business, financial condition and reputation.
Further, the advance of generative artificial intelligence ( AI ) may give rise to additional vulnerabilities and potential entry points for cyber threats.
